title: 请求虚拟机状态变更 (RequestStateChange 启动与停止)
title_en: Request Virtual Machine State Change (RequestStateChange Start and Stop)
output:
Created VM path=...Msvm_ComputerSystem...Name="C0E9CB30-BADA-4011-9C31-F5A390268A9B"
Initial EnabledState=3 (Disabled)
RequestStateChange(2=Enabled) rv=4096
  start job final JobState=7 errCode=0 errDesc=
After start EnabledState=2 (Enabled)
RequestStateChange(3=Disabled) rv=4096
  stop job final JobState=7 errCode=0 errDesc=
After stop EnabledState=3 (Disabled)
ASSERT startCallAccepted=True reachedRunning=True stopCallAccepted=True reachedPoweredOff=True
Cleanup DestroySystem rv=4096
RESULT=PASS
notes: RequestStateChange 在虚拟机对象(Msvm_ComputerSystem)上调用：$vm.RequestStateChange(RequestedState, [out]Job, [TimeoutPeriod])。在 Windows PowerShell 5.1 / Get-WmiObject 下只需传首个 IN 参数($null 占位 TimeoutPeriod)。返回对象含 .ReturnValue 与 .Job。
RequestedState 的 ValueMap：2=Enabled(启动)，3=Disabled(关机/断电)，4=ShutDown(经集成服务正常关机)，10=Reboot，11=Reset，32769=Saved，32773=Saving 等。
返回码：0 表示同步完成，4096 表示已启动异步作业，需轮询 Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState 至 7(Completed)，JobState 3/4 表示运行中。
空的第二代虚拟机无需引导介质或嵌套虚拟化即可完成 Disabled(3) -> Enabled(2) -> Disabled(3) 的状态转换，作业 ErrorCode=0。
读取 EnabledState 前需重新以 [wmi]$vm.__PATH 刷新实例；状态转换为异步，建议等待约 800ms 后再读取。
清理时应在 finally 中先确保虚拟机处于关闭态(3 或 32768)再调用 DestroySystem，否则删除可能被拒绝。
notes_en: RequestStateChange is called on the virtual machine object (Msvm_ComputerSystem): $vm.RequestStateChange(RequestedState, [out]Job, [TimeoutPeriod]). Under Windows PowerShell 5.1 / Get-WmiObject, only the first IN parameter needs to be passed ($null as a placeholder for TimeoutPeriod). The returned object contains .ReturnValue and .Job.

ValueMap for RequestedState: 2=Enabled (start), 3=Disabled (power off/turn off), 4=ShutDown (graceful shutdown through the integration services), 10=Reboot, 11=Reset, 32769=Saved, 32773=Saving, and so on.

Return codes: 0 indicates synchronous completion, 4096 indicates an asynchronous job has started and Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState must be polled until 7 (Completed); JobState 3/4 indicates the job is running.
An empty generation 2 virtual machine can complete the Disabled(3) -> Enabled(2) -> Disabled(3) state transition without boot media or nested virtualization, with job ErrorCode=0.
Before reading EnabledState, the instance must be refreshed again with [wmi]$vm.__PATH; the state transition is asynchronous, so waiting about 800ms before reading is recommended.
During cleanup, the finally block should first ensure the virtual machine is in an off state (3 or 32768) before calling DestroySystem, otherwise deletion may be rejected.
